tickets.description: Define TypeScript types for MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus, and Settings used throughout the app.
constraints: Export all types from this file
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus, and Settings types/interfaces used in frontend and backend.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify types match PRD data structures and cover all required fields.

tickets.description: Set up SQLite database schema and connection using SQLAlchemy for MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, and Settings tables.
constraints: Create tables for categories, items, orders, and settings
Use SQLite file 'foodcart.db' in project root
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports SQLAlchemy Base, engine, sessionmaker, and ORM models for MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, and Settings.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify tables have correct columns and relationships as per PRD.

tickets.description: Create FastAPI app instance with CORS middleware allowing local network access and mount static files for frontend build.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports FastAPI app instance with CORS and static files mounted.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify app runs and serves static files from /static endpoint.

tickets.description: Implement WebSocket manager utility to handle multiple client connections with broadcast and send personal message methods.
constraints: Support broadcast and send to single client
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports WebSocketManager class with connect, disconnect, send_personal_message, and broadcast methods.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify manager can track connections and send messages correctly.

tickets.description: Create React app entry point with Tailwind CSS setup and global styles for mobile-first responsive design.
constraints: Set viewport meta tag in index.html
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File renders React.StrictMode root with empty App component placeholder.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify app renders blank page with Tailwind styles applied.

tickets.description: Configure Vite to build React frontend and serve static files from backend /static endpoint.
constraints: Configure base path for static assets
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports Vite config that outputs build to backend static folder.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify frontend build files appear in backend/static after build.

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for MenuCategory CRUD: list, create, update, delete, and reorder categories.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports router with endpoints GET /, POST /, PUT /{id}, DELETE /{id}, PATCH /reorder
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify endpoints perform correct DB operations and return JSON responses.

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for MenuItem CRUD with photo upload support and availability toggle.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports router with endpoints GET /, POST /, PUT /{id}, DELETE /{id} supporting photo upload and availability toggle
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify photo uploads save files and DB updates accordingly.

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for Orders: create order, list orders, update order status, and get order by ID.
constraints: Broadcast order status changes via WebSocket
Order status enum: Preparing, Ready, Picked Up
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports router with POST /, GET /, PUT /{id}/status, GET /{id} endpoints and sends WebSocket updates
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify orders can be created, updated, listed, and status updates broadcasted.

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for Settings: get and update cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN.
constraints: Settings stored in single DB row
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports router with GET / and PUT / endpoints for settings
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings can be retrieved and updated successfully.

tickets.description: Implement backend WebSocket endpoint for real-time order status updates and admin notifications.
constraints: Send JSON messages with event and data fields
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports websocket endpoint that accepts connections and handles messages
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify clients can connect and receive broadcast messages.

tickets.description: Create React MenuBrowse page that fetches menu categories and items, displays items grouped by category with photos, descriptions, and prices.
tickets.interaction_spec: User opens app, sees categories with items, each item shows photo, name, description, price.
constraints: Use fetch API to GET /api/menu-categories and /api/menu-items
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports MenuBrowse component that fetches and renders menu grouped by category with photos and details.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify menu loads correctly with categories and items displayed as per PRD.

tickets.description: Create React CartContext and CartProvider to manage cart state with add, remove, update quantity methods.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports CartProvider and useCart hook managing cart items with quantity controls.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify cart state updates correctly and persists across reloads.

tickets.description: Create React CartSidebar component that displays cart items with quantity controls and total price, and a submit order button.
tickets.interaction_spec: User adds items to cart, opens sidebar, adjusts quantities, sees total price, and clicks submit order.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports CartSidebar component showing cart items, quantity controls, total price, and submit button.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify cart updates and submit button triggers order submission callback.

tickets.description: Create React OrderSubmission component that submits cart items to backend /api/orders and shows confirmation with order number.
tickets.interaction_spec: User clicks submit order, component sends POST /api/orders, then shows confirmation with order number.
constraints: Use fetch POST with JSON body
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports OrderSubmission component that submits order and displays confirmation message.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify order submission works and confirmation displays order number.

tickets.description: Create React OrderStatusTracker component that connects to WebSocket /ws and displays real-time order status updates.
tickets.interaction_spec: User enters order number, component connects WebSocket, listens for status updates, and displays current status.
constraints: Show status transitions Preparing → Ready → Picked Up
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports OrderStatusTracker component that manages WebSocket connection and displays live order status.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify real-time status updates received and displayed correctly.

tickets.description: Create React AdminLogin page that prompts for PIN and validates against backend /api/settings admin PIN, storing login state.
tickets.interaction_spec: User enters PIN, clicks submit, app validates PIN via API, on success navigates to admin panel, on failure shows error.
constraints: Use fetch GET /api/settings to get PIN
Store login state in React context or localStorage
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports AdminLogin component that authenticates PIN and manages login state.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify correct PIN grants access, wrong PIN shows error.

tickets.description: Create React AdminMenuManagement page that lists menu items with edit and delete buttons, and a button to add new item.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views list of menu items, clicks edit to open edit form, delete to remove, or add new to open create form.
constraints: Protect page behind admin login state
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports AdminMenuManagement component that lists items with edit, delete, and add new functionality.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify menu items load and buttons trigger correct actions.

tickets.description: Create React AdminMenuItemForm component for creating and editing menu items with photo upload and availability toggle.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin fills form fields, uploads photo, toggles availability, submits to create or update menu item.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports AdminMenuItemForm component that handles create/edit with photo upload and availability toggle.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify form submits correctly and photo uploads work.

tickets.description: Create React AdminOrderManagement page that lists incoming orders with timestamps and allows updating order status with one click.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views orders list, clicks status button to cycle status Preparing → Ready → Picked Up, list updates in real-time.
constraints: Use fetch API for order updates
Use WebSocket for real-time order notifications
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports AdminOrderManagement component that lists orders and updates status with real-time updates.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify orders update status on click and real-time notifications arrive.

tickets.description: Create React AdminDailySalesSummary component that fetches and displays daily sales total and order count.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin opens admin panel and sees daily sales total and number of orders placed today.
constraints: Use fetch API to get sales summary from backend (implement stub if needed)
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports AdminDailySalesSummary component that displays daily sales total and order count.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify sales summary data is fetched and displayed correctly.

tickets.description: Create React AdminSettings page that allows updating cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin edits settings fields and submits form to update backend settings.
constraints: Use fetch API for GET and PUT /api/settings
Validate PIN is numeric and 4 digits
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports AdminSettings component that fetches and updates settings with form validation.
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings load and update correctly with validation.
